---
name: Feature Request
about: Request a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
Clear description of what feature you'd like.

## Use Case
Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work? Describe the behavior you'd expect.

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
- Related issues: #123
- Examples from other projects
- User impact estimate
- Implementation difficulty: Low / Medium / High

## Acceptance Criteria
How would we know this feature is complete?
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Checklist
- [ ] I've searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] This isn't a duplicate of another feature request
- [ ] This aligns with project goals
